vBRIEFInfo.description: Scaffold generated by deft-directive-swarm Phase 0 from GitHub issue #574. Full acceptance criteria live in the referenced GitHub issue body.

plan.title: drop sources/generates from tasks/prd.yml so task prd:render -- --force reaches the script

narratives.Overview: `deft/tasks/prd.yml` declares sources:/generates: which causes go-task to short-circuit cmds: when inputs are unchanged, dropping CLI_ARGS and silently breaking the #539 refuse-to-overwrite recovery path (`-- --force`). Fix: (1) drop sources:/generates: from prd.yml; (2) add inline comment explaining the intentional absence; (3) new `conventions/task-caching.md` documenting the invariant (tasks accepting user recovery flags MUST NOT declare sources/generates); (4) guard-rail test at `tests/content/test_taskfile_caching.py` parametrized over all tasks/*.yml; (5) audit pass + regression test on a throwaway fixture: hand-authored PRD.md, run `task prd:render -- --force`, assert overwritten. See GitHub issue #574 for full text and acceptance criteria.

references.title: Issue #574: drop sources/generates from tasks/prd.yml (supersedes #573 for immediate fix)
